category_sources: Official GitHub README says it is a TUI dashboard for controlling and monitoring Framework Laptop hardware.
source_facts.description says TUI for controlling and monitoring Framework Computers hardware.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Framework System TUI.
source_facts.name provides the executable/package name framework-tool-tui.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents features, installation, run instructions, and architecture link.
Official repository docs/ARCHITECTURE.md is linked from the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/grouzen/framework-tool-tui; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists battery, privacy, lighting, USB PD, fan, thermal, and BIOS monitoring/control features.
